title: Method Level 6E — Mastery
summary: Capstone mastery exercises spanning all Level 6 keys: Ab major, F/C/Bb harmonic minor, E/B/F# harmonic minor, and chromatic passages. Velocity études, perpetual-motion figures, and longer pieces up to 12 measures complete the Method curriculum.

exercises.title: Velocity Étude in Ab Major
exercises.summary: Ascending and descending Ab major scale runs in eighth notes for right hand over steady half-note harmonic bass.
exercises.goal: Build finger velocity and evenness through the Ab major scale at tempo 108.

exercises.title: Perpetual Motion in F Harmonic Minor
exercises.summary: Continuous eighth-note motion through the F harmonic minor scale, featuring the raised 7th (E natural) as a leading tone.
exercises.goal: Maintain even perpetual-motion sixteenth-note texture while outlining F harmonic minor harmony.

exercises.title: Canon Fragment in C Harmonic Minor
exercises.summary: Right hand enters with a rising C harmonic minor subject; left hand follows two beats later in strict imitation at the lower octave.
exercises.goal: Coordinate independent voices in canonic texture while maintaining the raised 7th (B natural) in both hands.

exercises.title: Tarantella in E Harmonic Minor
exercises.summary: Fast dance in E harmonic minor with driving eighth notes in the right hand and sustained harmonic support in the left.
exercises.goal: Execute rapid E harmonic minor passages with D# leading tone at quarter = 116.

exercises.title: Nocturne Capstone in Bb Minor
exercises.summary: A flowing 3/4 nocturne in Bb harmonic minor with sustained melody and expressive use of the A natural raised 7th leading tone.
exercises.goal: Shape a singing melody in Bb minor over 10 measures with careful voice leading to the raised 7th.

exercises.title: Étude in B Harmonic Minor
exercises.summary: Scale-based étude through B harmonic minor with running eighth notes and the A# leading tone highlighted at the top of each phrase.
exercises.goal: Master B harmonic minor fingering at tempo 100 with clear A# raised 7th leading to the octave.

exercises.title: Scherzo Fragment in F# Harmonic Minor
exercises.summary: Brisk scherzo through F# harmonic minor with E# as raised 7th enharmonic leading tone, rapid eighth-note runs.
exercises.goal: Navigate F# harmonic minor at tempo 112, treating E# (enharmonic F) as a leading tone to F#.

exercises.title: Sonatina in Ab Major
exercises.summary: A lyrical sonatina in Ab major spanning 10 measures with quarter-note melody, eighth-note runs, and a broad climax in measure 7.
exercises.goal: Play a complete sonatina exposition in Ab major with musical shaping across 10 measures.

exercises.title: Fugue Subject in C Harmonic Minor
exercises.summary: A two-voice fugal texture: right hand presents the C harmonic minor subject, left hand enters one measure later at the lower octave.
exercises.goal: Balance two independent contrapuntal voices through C harmonic minor, keeping the B natural raised 7th clear.

exercises.title: Romance in F Harmonic Minor
exercises.summary: A lyrical 3/4 romance in F harmonic minor with singable melody and the raised E natural 7th resolving to F.
exercises.goal: Sing out the melody in F harmonic minor over 10 measures, voicing the E natural raised 7th expressively.

exercises.title: Allegro in E Harmonic Minor
exercises.summary: Energetic eighth-note study in E harmonic minor covering the full two-octave range with D# leading tone.
exercises.goal: Play E harmonic minor scale passages fluently at tempo 100, emphasizing the D# raised 7th.

exercises.title: Étude brillante in Ab Major
exercises.summary: Arpeggiated figuration over Ab, Db, and Eb harmonies with sweeping eighth-note broken-chord patterns in the right hand.
exercises.goal: Execute smooth broken-chord arpeggiation through Ab major harmony at tempo 108.

exercises.title: Lento cantabile in B Harmonic Minor
exercises.summary: Slow, singing melody in B harmonic minor that ascends through the full octave and lingers on A# before resolving to B.
exercises.goal: Project a long melodic line in B harmonic minor at tempo 58, holding each note's full value.

exercises.title: Velocity Study in F# Harmonic Minor
exercises.summary: Two-octave velocity study through F# harmonic minor with the E# raised 7th punctuating each phrase apex.
exercises.goal: Build speed and accuracy through the F# harmonic minor scale across two octaves at tempo 100.

exercises.title: Grand Waltz in Bb Minor
exercises.summary: A 3/4 grand waltz in Bb harmonic minor with sweeping melody and the A natural raised 7th creating the characteristic harmonic tension.
exercises.goal: Project the waltz character in Bb minor across 10 measures, placing the A natural raised 7th on a strong beat.

exercises.title: Chromatic Étude
exercises.summary: Full chromatic scale ascending and descending from C5 to B5, with contrary-motion support in the left hand, cementing mastery of all twelve pitches.
exercises.goal: Execute the complete chromatic scale fluently in both directions at tempo 88.

exercises.title: Prelude perpetuo in F Harmonic Minor
exercises.summary: Perpetual-motion arpeggiated prelude in F harmonic minor with broken-chord figures outlining tonic, subdominant, and dominant harmony.
exercises.goal: Sustain even broken-chord figuration through F harmonic minor across 8 measures at tempo 92.

exercises.title: Allegro con brio in B Harmonic Minor
exercises.summary: Fast, energetic study in B harmonic minor with driving eighth notes, reaching B5 at the peak and featuring the A# leading tone prominently.
exercises.goal: Play B harmonic minor at tempo 112 with clear articulation and confident A# raised 7th.

exercises.title: Grand Étude in Ab Major
exercises.summary: A 10-measure synthesis étude in Ab major combining scale runs, arpeggios, and melodic climax at Bb5, tying together all L6 Ab major vocabulary.
exercises.goal: Perform the complete Ab major synthesis piece across 10 measures with consistent tempo and evenness.

exercises.title: Method Level 6 Grand Finale
exercises.summary: A 12-measure capstone finale in A harmonic minor that summarizes the entire Method curriculum: scale runs, leaps, G# raised 7th, and a triumphant closing cadence.
exercises.goal: Perform the Method Level 6 grand finale with musicality and accuracy, bringing together all skills from Levels 1 through 6.
